title: Supersonic Copy Deck
description: Per-page website body copy produced by the copywriter skill during Phase 8, after seo-strategist owns the SEO metadata and layout-architect composes the page. The copywriter fills body copy only: it never authors SEO titles, meta descriptions, slugs, schema, or the H1/H2/H3 heading outline. Those headings appear here only as a read-only locked_headings echo; the slot role enum has no heading member, so a heading can never be written as an editable slot. Per-slot length caps and sibling_group balance come from each pattern's copy_slots in data/pattern-certifications.json (the budget source of truth). Generate data/copy-deck.json from this schema in a cloned site repo; data/copy-deck.example.json is a worked example. tools/validate-copy.mjs (npm run copy:check) enforces every rule here plus banned characters, phrases-to-avoid, length caps, sibling balance, brief linkage, and registry consistency.

source.description: Provenance. The copy deck is downstream of these inputs and must never become a second source of truth for SEO metadata or layout structure.

briefs.description: Path to the seo-strategist briefs this copy fills, e.g. data/seo-briefs.json.

intake.description: Path to the client intake the voice is grounded in, e.g. data/site-intake.json.

compositions.description: Path to the layout-architect page composition manifest, e.g. data/page-compositions.json.

url_slug.description: Echoed from the brief for traceability. Lowercase, hyphen-separated path; root home page may be "/".

word_count_target.description: Echoed from brief.target_word_count; advisory. Per-slot caps are the hard gates.

locked_headings.description: Read-only echo of the brief heading outline for traceability. NEVER writer-editable; owned by seo-strategist and placed by layout-architect. Not length-checked by the copy validator because the writer does not own this text.

id.description: Stable slot id, unique within the page.

role.description: The kind of editable copy. Deliberately excludes the SEO heading outline (no h1/h2/h3 member): headings are owned upstream and only echoed in locked_headings.

pattern_slug.description: The pattern this slot belongs to, e.g. supersonic-site-theme/section-service-cards. Used with slot_ref for the registry-consistency cross-check.

slot_ref.description: The id of the pattern's copy_slots entry this slot instantiates. Repeatable slots reuse the same slot_ref across instances.

max_chars.description: Per-slot hard cap, denormalized from the pattern copy_slot. Keeps image-adjacent copy from overflowing its column.

sibling_group.description: Page-unique tag; slots sharing it must hold roughly equal text (e.g. cards in a row). Enforced within +/-25% by the validator.

section_ref.description: The brief section h2 this slot supports, for traceability.
